details.productUrlName: Saproling Ripple Foil Emblem Garruk Apex Predator Double Sided Token

customAttributes.description:
Garruk, Apex Predator
Whenever a creature attacks you, it gets +5/+5 and gains trample until end of turn.

Disclaimer: Please note that the double-sided token received will only have one side printed with the Ripple Foil effect. The Ripple Foil side is indicated on the token name.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 6/14/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
